[{"key":"0.65236654304552254","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/48a218c8-dad0-4f8b-8657-1b801e65d789.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/ba55575e-f8ff-4a24-a02c-51b723d0cccb.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.98494dbc695a28","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炀"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者炀，身份编码E23-080888，Re-A芯片状态稳定未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"是十三区高校的学生，为开发自身原质能力加入学校。炀的成绩一塌糊涂，这种成绩理应是要被退学的，但炀的家人为学校指助了大笔的贺助金，因此对他而言功课不及格也算不上什么大事了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炀的原质能量非常稳定，换包话说就是他身上几平没有能量存在的迹象，但他在战斗中依旧拥有看不容忽视的输出……这主要归功于他身上的原能饰品与宠物「阿堵！。十万别小看阿堵，它的原能反应比很多异格者还要强得多。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/157597/2024/3/26/831251.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","vertical 1.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/758801.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【天真的大少爷】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炀不算在学校中最让人头疼的学生。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"至少比起动不动就把大公司的网络搞到瘫痪的克洛斯，或者不管有谁大家都抢着去插一脚的阿凛来说，炀最多只是一个有钱任性的大少爷。他虽然做过许多出格的事，但大多时候都局限于没什么实质性伤害的举动，比如雇佣派对公司在学校操场布置室外泳池，或者纵容宠物犬在学校的花园里挖坑埋吃的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这家伙在学校里每天都一幅没心没肺的得意模样，不少同学都在私下议论，炀纨绔子弟的做派只是表面功夫，对他而言更贴切的描述应该是「天真到有些愚蠢」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这在十三区高校可不多见一一十三区高校的孩子大都有些灰暗的过往，连那个看起来像是有自闭症的剪纸女孩都很会察言观色，而炀听不懂任何弦外之音，永远狂妄到不知天高地厚！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大概也只有炀这样从小到大无忧无虑、想要什么都能轻易买到的家伙，才会长成这样吧。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【钞能力也是能力】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炀家里是真的很有钱!"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然十三区高校不乏家境优渥的学生，但却很少有人像炀这样，身上自带一种暴发户般的张扬气质。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炀是那种典型的什么都不在乎、穷到只剩钱的家庭里养出的孩子一一他的衣服虽然搭配得称不上有品位，但每一件都价格昂贵。还有那一身增强原质能力的饰品，普通人打工几辈子挣的钱都买不起。就连那条狗据说都是用了大笔伊瑟币从E.O.S.的局子里赎出来的，为了留住它，每个月都要提交一笔天价的保证金。整个伊瑟大概没有比那还贵重的宠物了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但在炀所有豪掷千金买来的贵价物里，那条狗或许是最划算的一笔交易了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"十三区里也有些横行霸道的家伙，但只要有那条狗在，谁也不敢去招惹炀。它是会拼命保护主人的那种忠犬呢！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"康坦士校长对炀养狗的事情十分支持，即便那只狗早就被很多同学投诉过了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这对他是很重要的一课哦，去理解世界上最珍贵的东西是钱买不到的。」一一那个笑眯眯的老头子这样说。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【吃喝玩乐才是真谛】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不少刻薄的人说，相较于正儿八经的学校，十三区高校更像收容怪胎的「马戏团」。很多学生都是「非自愿」入学，说是「抓捕」也不过分。遭遇这种贬低，即使是强势如大小姐也把自己关在房子里好几天才振作起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炀是个例外，他当年啊，可是带着一个车队像搬家一样热热闹闹进来的。第一次见到有人把入校办得像件了不起的大喜事一样呢。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很快他就发现学校的宿舍根本没有那么大地方摆放那些贵重的硬箱、皮沙发和长绒地毯，当然更不存在能容纳整季奢牌新衣的衣帽间。于是那些家具衣帽之类的东西不得不原封不动送回家，而剩下的吃的，炀大手一挥它们留了下来，就地分给了路过的学生们，让很多孩子开了眼界。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「炀完全不知道来这里意味着什么。」不少学生这样议论着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"刚开始也有人不断向他灌输一些消极的想法，可是这家伙的脑子里似乎完全没有这根筋。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「活着是要明白一些道理」、「活着是要做出一番成就」、「活着是要成为他人记忆中最绚烂的名字」……类似的讨论总是无止无休，每个人都有自己的看法。问到炀的时候，他眉头拧成一团，用打量笨蛋的眼神盯着代课老师，没礼貌地嚷嚷了起来：「本少爷活着当然是为了吃喝玩乐啊——」他拖长尾音，一字一顿，「快乐的一天比你们这些家伙忧心忡忡的一百年有价值得多！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"好吧，勉强也算一种答案。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出，拉条，增益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击可拉条，可给队友增益，pvp中配合启示录还能打出6段真实伤害。pve多琪本中也能当工具人加暴击攻击buff"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+6狂怒+6极影强袭"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"启示录"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/998897.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"dufCUO0g1K7T2Bp8","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
